# Swarmlabs - Complete Guide for AI Agents

## Overview
Swarmlabs is a virtual experiment platform with 145 physics-based engines validated against 7,550 real experimental datasets from peer-reviewed publications. It covers 22 physics categories including catalysis, electrochemistry, membrane separation, crystallization, and more.

## Key Metrics
- 145 virtual experiment engines
- 7,550 validation datasets
- 99.6% have real paper citations
- 100% of engines achieve <15% mean error
- 22 physics categories
- Mean prediction error: 4.6%

## Physics Categories (22)
1. Catalysis Kinetics (5 engines): Suzuki, Heck, Sonogashira, Buchwald, Olefin Metathesis
2. Electrochemistry (5 engines): Battery, CO2, Electrolysis, Electroplating, Corrosion
3. Mass Transfer (4 engines): Distillation, Extraction, Gas Absorption, Leaching
4. Particle Engineering (4 engines): Crystal, Granulation, Filtration, Flocculation
5. Heat Transfer (3 engines): Drying, Evaporation, Calcination
6. Membrane Separation (3 engines): Membrane, Electrodialysis, Membrane Distillation
7. Reaction Engineering (2 engines): CSTR, PFR
8. Thermal Decomposition (2 engines): Pyrolysis, Combustion
9. Phase Equilibrium (2 engines): Azeotropic, Extractive Distillation
10. Colloid Interface (2 engines): Flotation, Fluidization
11. Materials Science (2 engines): Perovskite, Polymer
12. Advanced Oxidation (2 engines): PhotoFenton, Sonochemical
13-22: Analytical Chemistry, Green Solvent, Molecular Simulation, Biochemistry, Quantum Chemistry, Supercritical Fluid, Multiphysics Coupling, Validation, Nuclear Chemistry, Nanomaterials

## Research Skills (5)
1. PaperSpine: Paper decomposition from DOI/URL
2. Citation Verify: 93.3% accuracy DOI verification
3. Stats Sanity: Statistical analysis of 3866 real datasets
4. Literature Survey: Systematic review with Crossref API
5. Scientific Writing: IMRAD/CONSORT/STROBE/PRISMA templates

## Marketing Skills (5)
1. GrowthPulse: GitHub competitor analysis + LTV/CAC
2. SEOPulse: 14-site HTTP monitoring + IndexNow logs
3. ContentForge: SEO articles + Twitter threads + blog posts
4. CompetitorRadar: Real GitHub data for LangChain/CrewAI/AutoGen
5. LaunchKit: 17 channels + 6 KPIs + press release generation

## API
- Base: http://localhost:8461/api/v1
- POST /run/{engine}: Run virtual experiment
- POST /optimize/{engine}: AI Pareto optimization
- GET /engines: List all 145 engines
- OpenAPI: /openapi.json

## Pricing
- Free: $0 (all engines, basic features)
- Pro: $29/month (advanced optimization, paper generation)
- Enterprise: $499 (full database, custom engines)
